title: ardisia lucida
intro: Ardisia lucida, also known as Tengamora or Shangye, is a plant species in the Ardisia genus, belonging to the family Myrsinaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ardisia lucida include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Ardisia lucida is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
